description: A lone unmatched opening `{` raises ol-unmatched-brace. `{ }` itself is a VALID empty dict literal (spec/grammar.md dict-literal), so only a genuinely unpaired brace is stack-neutral across Core and Data. Closes the corpus gap noted at M1 close (issue #195): ol-unmatched-brace had 10+ unit assertions but zero fixtures. Parse-only: the program is not execution-valid.
